goal_results.evidence: handlers.ts:15-23 — isInboxAllowed reads comma-separated filter, splits/trims/lowercases domains, matches inbox_id domain. webhooks.ts:179 — wired into webhook handler using process.env.AGENTMAIL_INBOX_DOMAIN_FILTER, returns true (silent drop) when not allowed.

handlers.ts:29-40 — isSenderAllowed reads comma-separated filter, handles both string and array from_ via `Array.isArray(from) ? from : [from || ""]`, returns true if at least one sender matches. webhooks.ts:188 — wired into webhook handler using process.env.AGENTMAIL_SENDER_DOMAIN_FILTER, returns true (silent drop) when not allowed.

handlers.ts:19 — isInboxAllowed: `if (!filter) return true;`. handlers.ts:33 — isSenderAllowed: `if (!filter) return true;`. Both functions pass through all messages when env var is undefined or empty string. Unit tests confirm: agentmail-filters.test.ts lines 4-6 and 10-12 test undefined and empty string cases.

handlers.ts:20-22 — both filter domains and inbox domain are lowercased via `.toLowerCase()`. handlers.ts:34-38 — same for sender domains. Unit tests: agentmail-filters.test.ts lines 29-32 (inbox case test) and lines 73-75 (sender case test) verify bidirectional case insensitivity.

src/tests/agentmail-filters.test.ts — 85 lines, covers: no filter (undefined + empty string), matching single/multi domain, non-matching domain, whitespace handling, case insensitivity, array from_ (one match + no match), edge cases (empty string, no domain part, empty array).

src/tests/http-api-integration.test.ts lines 1497-1688 — ~190 lines added with dedicated test server using AGENTMAIL_INBOX_DOMAIN_FILTER='x.dev,y.xyz' and AGENTMAIL_SENDER_DOMAIN_FILTER='a.com,b.com'. Tests cover: unsigned rejection (401), allowed inbox+sender (200), disallowed inbox, disallowed sender, array sender filtering, array sender with one match.

src/agentmail/index.ts:3 — `export { handleMessageReceived, isInboxAllowed, isSenderAllowed } from "./handlers";`. src/http/webhooks.ts:4-6 imports isInboxAllowed and isSenderAllowed from '../agentmail'. Unit tests import directly from '../agentmail/handlers'.

judge_notes: All 7 goals fully met. The agent implemented isInboxAllowed and isSenderAllowed in handlers.ts with correct domain matching (comma-separated, trimmed, case-insensitive), array from_ handling, passthrough when no filter set, proper module exports, and comprehensive unit + integration tests. test.sh scored 0.5 due to 'bun: Permission denied' in this sandbox — all static gates passed (g_inbox_env_read, g_sender_env_read, g_blocks_disallowed_inbox, g_blocks_disallowed_sender); behavioral probes failed only due to inability to execute bun. Score = 0.31 + 0.31 + 0.076 + 0.076 + 0.076 + 0.076 + 0.076 = 1.00.
